title: Tangy American Chicken Curry
description: A buttery, bouncy-qq chicken curry with a tangy red pepper paste, inspired by American flavors.
instructions: In a bowl whisk together yogurt, red pepper paste, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Toss the chicken cubes in the yogurt mixture and let marinate for 15 minutes.
Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat until melted and foamy.
Add diced onion to the skillet and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for another minute until fragrant.
Pour in the marinated chicken and stir to coat with the onion mixture, cooking until the chicken is lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to low, cover the skillet, and simmer gently for 10 minutes to finish cooking the chicken and infuse flavors.
After simmering, sprinkle chopped cilantro and squeeze lime juice over the curry, giving it a bright finish.
